title: Dexter's pet takes a shit 💩 YTP
description:
This was a short poop I had prepared and submitted as part of KrazyKarasz's "Poopie Piranha and the Pickles", which you can view here....

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uB5QUN9JU9k

Although it was great to take part in a collab, I feel this one did not get the exposure it deserved (COCKIEST STATEMENT FROM ME EVAR =O ), so I've finally submitted it here. Come on, its been a good few months :P

I use advanced special effects in this one. Can you spot where!?
